query:
SELECT r.name as role_name, p.code as permission_code, p.module, p.action 
FROM rolePermissions rp 
JOIN systemRoles r ON rp.roleId = r.id 
JOIN permissions p ON rp.permissionId = p.id 
WHERE r.code = 'admin' AND p.module = 'sites'
ORDER BY p.code;

WHERE r.code = 'admin' AND p.module = 'sites'
